highlights: One of Penang's most trusted pure-vegetarian Indian restaurants

attractions.name: George Town UNESCO Heritage Walk
attractions.description: Living museum of colonial-era shophouses, clan homes, and vibrant street life blending Chinese, Malay, Indian, and European influences
attractions.hours: Best explored in the morning to avoid heat
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Street Art Trail
attractions.description: Famous murals by Ernest Zacharevic and others add humour and storytelling to old walls
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Chew Jetty
attractions.description: Traditional Chinese stilt village built over the sea, offers glimpse into Penang's maritime heritage and community life
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
